languages.text: "Вы..." {n}Себериан резко умолкает. Морщинки возле органического глаза разглаживаются. Когда взгляд, проскользнув по вашим спутникам, оставнавливается на вас, в нем нет ни тени былых эмоций — только надменная холодность, с которой он встретил вас впервые.{/n}
languages.translation_comment:
В пачке есть Ульфар, Маражай, Ирлиэт, Эоганн или Паскаль — т.е. Себериан удивился хотя бы одному из спутников
Разово выдаем DL_MindsBlocked_counter +1 (не повторяется в DL_SeberianLoopMain_dialogue)

В пачке есть Ульфар, Маражай, Ирлиэт, Эоганн или Паскаль — т.е. Себериан удивился хотя бы одному из спутников
Разово выдаем DL_MindsBlocked_counter +1 (не повторяется в DL_SeberianLoopMain_dialogue)

languages.text: "You..." {n}Seberian abruptly falls silent. The wrinkles around his organic eye smooth out. When his gaze slides over your companions and comes to rest on you, there is not even a flicker of his past feeling in it, only the haughty coldness with which he met you for the first time.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Вы..." {n}Себериан резко умолкает. Морщинки возле органического глаза разглаживаются. Когда взгляд, проскользнув по вашим спутникам, оставнавливается на вас, в нем нет ни тени былых эмоций — только надменная холодность, с которой он встретил вас впервые.{/n}

"You..." {n}Seberian abruptly falls silent. The wrinkles around his organic eye smooth out. When his gaze slides over your companions and comes to rest on you, there is not even a flicker of his past feeling in it, only the haughty coldness with which he met you for the first time.{/n}

languages.text: “你……”{n}塞贝里安突然沉默了。他那只有机肉眼周围的皱纹舒展开来。当他的目光掠过你的同伴，最终落在你身上时，其中再无半分方才的情绪波动，唯有他初次见你时那种倨傲的冷漠。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You..." {n}Seberian abruptly falls silent. The wrinkles around his organic eye smooth out. When his gaze slides over your companions and comes to rest on you, there is not even a flicker of his past feeling in it, only the haughty coldness with which he met you for the first time.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “你……”{n}塞贝里安突然沉默了。他那只有机肉眼周围的皱纹舒展开来。当他的目光掠过你的同伴，最终落在你身上时，其中再无半分方才的情绪波动，唯有他初次见你时那种倨傲的冷漠。{/n}

languages.text: « Vous... » {n}Seberian s'interrompt brusquement et les rides qui cernent son œil organique s'estompent. Lorsque son regard glisse sur vos compagnons pour venir se poser sur vous, vous n'y décelez pas la moindre trace de ses émotions précédentes, seulement la froideur hautaine qu'il vous a témoignée de prime abord.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You..." {n}Seberian abruptly falls silent. The wrinkles around his organic eye smooth out. When his gaze slides over your companions and comes to rest on you, there is not even a flicker of his past feeling in it, only the haughty coldness with which he met you for the first time.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Vous... » {n}Seberian s'interrompt brusquement et les rides qui cernent son œil organique s'estompent. Lorsque son regard glisse sur vos compagnons pour venir se poser sur vous, vous n'y décelez pas la moindre trace de ses émotions précédentes, seulement la froideur hautaine qu'il vous a témoignée de prime abord.{/n}

languages.text: "Sen..." {n}Seberian aniden susuyor. Organik gözünün etrafındaki kırışıklıklar yok oluyor. Bakışları yoldaşlarının üzerinden kayıp senin üzerinde durduğunda geçmiş duygusundan en ufak bir emare bile göremiyorsun. Suratına yalnızca seninle ilk karşılaştığı zamanki o kibirli soğukluk çarpıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You..." {n}Seberian abruptly falls silent. The wrinkles around his organic eye smooth out. When his gaze slides over your companions and comes to rest on you, there is not even a flicker of his past feeling in it, only the haughty coldness with which he met you for the first time.{/n}

Bakışları yoldaşlarının üzerinden kayıp senin üzerinde durduğunda geçmiş duygusundan en ufak bir emare bile göremiyorsun. Suratına yalnızca seninle ilk karşılaştığı zamanki o kibirli soğukluk çarpıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Usted...». {n}Seberian guarda silencio repentinamente. Las arrugas en torno a su ojo orgánico se alisan. Cuando su mirada recorre a tus aliados y se posa en ti, no queda ni un atisbo de su anterior sentimiento, solo la altiva frialdad de vuestro primer encuentro.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You..." {n}Seberian abruptly falls silent. The wrinkles around his organic eye smooth out. When his gaze slides over your companions and comes to rest on you, there is not even a flicker of his past feeling in it, only the haughty coldness with which he met you for the first time.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Usted...». {n}Seberian guarda silencio repentinamente. Las arrugas en torno a su ojo orgánico se alisan. Cuando su mirada recorre a tus aliados y se posa en ti, no queda ni un atisbo de su anterior sentimiento, solo la altiva frialdad de vuestro primer encuentro.{/n}

languages.text: "Ihr ..." {n}Seberian verstummt. Die Falten um sein organisches Auge glätten sind. Als sein Blick über deine Gefährten und schließlich zu dir schweift, erkennst du darin nicht den Hauch eines Gefühls, nur die abweisende Kälte, mit der er dir bei Eurem ersten Treffen begegnet ist.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You..." {n}Seberian abruptly falls silent. The wrinkles around his organic eye smooth out. When his gaze slides over your companions and comes to rest on you, there is not even a flicker of his past feeling in it, only the haughty coldness with which he met you for the first time.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ihr ..." {n}Seberian verstummt. Die Falten um sein organisches Auge glätten sind. Als sein Blick über deine Gefährten und schließlich zu dir schweift, erkennst du darin nicht den Hauch eines Gefühls, nur die abweisende Kälte, mit der er dir bei Eurem ersten Treffen begegnet ist.{/n}

languages.text: 「お前…」{n}シベリアは突然沈黙した。有機的な眼の周りの皺が消えた。彼の視線が仲間たちを通り、君に止まった時、過去の感情の残光すら見られなかった。君に初めて出会った時と同じ、傲慢な冷たさだけが彼の眼に宿っていた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You..." {n}Seberian abruptly falls silent. The wrinkles around his organic eye smooth out. When his gaze slides over your companions and comes to rest on you, there is not even a flicker of his past feeling in it, only the haughty coldness with which he met you for the first time.{/n}
